author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added FerrayError::is_linalg_error() -> bool predicate returning true for SingularMatrix, ConvergenceFailure, NumericalInstability variants. The Rust equivalent of catching numpy's LinAlgError without cascading API changes.

Avoids the alternative refactors (separate LinalgError type or FerrayError::Linalg variant) which would require rewriting every error construction site across ferray-linalg / ferray-stats / ferray-fft.

2 tests covering true (3 variants) and false (5 non-linalg) cases. ferray-core: 639 -> 641 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit fe9f903c.
